article_items.title: Exclusive: Microsoft is building a super app that combines coding, chat, and other Copilot AI tools | Fortune
article_items.description: The project is being spearheaded by new Copilot chief Jacob Andreou, as Microsoft seeks to streamline its lineup of AI tools amid competition from Google, OpenAI, and Anthropic.
article_items.excerpt: The project is being spearheaded by new Copilot chief Jacob Andreou, as Microsoft seeks to streamline its lineup of AI tools amid competition from Google, OpenAI, and Anthropic.
article_items.summary: The company plans to launch the super app by the end of summer. Its partner-rival OpenAI has had plans to combine its ChatGPT app and its Codex coding tool with its web browser into a single destination . key_points: The company plans to launch the super app by the end of summer.
Its partner-rival OpenAI has had plans to combine its ChatGPT app and its Codex coding tool with its web browser into a single destination .

The plans for the super app could evolve and are not yet final, the sources said, but the idea is to be able to combine a user’s Copilots into one central interface, including accounts from the productivity-focused.
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site.
Less than 4.5% of the 450 million customers of its Microsoft 365 office suite currently pay for Copilot features.
If you do not allow these cookies, we will not know when you have visited our site and will not be able to monitor its performance.
There may also be a toggle function for a user to go back and forth between their personal and enterprise 365 Copilots.
GitHub Copilot, which uses AI for software programming and is available starting at $10 a month for the Pro version, has more than 4.7 million paid subscribers.

The stakes are high for Microsoft, which was one of the first tech companies to make a big bet on AI, through a $13 billion partnership with OpenAI, but then lost its early lead as various rivals joined the race.
Microsoft also launched several versions of Copilot, confusing customers.
At next week’s Build conference, Microsoft AI Chief Executive Mustafa Suleyman is expected to unveil new proprietary AI models.
It has had a historic reliance on OpenAI’s AI models, which have at times lagged behind rivals in benchmarks and made Microsoft late to create its own models.

How AI has suddenly become much more useful to open-source developers Google's Gemma 4 model goes fully open-source and unlocks powerful local AI.
The project will then be expanded across PyPI, npm, Go, and other important open-source codebases.
But IBM and Red Hat insisted that the default path is upstream‑first, with the clearinghouse acting as a bridge between enterprise production demands and community release cadences.

To take this step, the two companies will invest $5 billion over the following years to roll out frontier‑scale AI models, tooling, and a global engineering organization dedicated to open-source security.

Boosting open-source code security At the heart of Project Lightwell is a new operational model that bridges the gap between enterprises and the upstream communities that build the software they rely on.
IBM and Red Hat bet $5 billion and 20,000 engineers can fix it ZDNET's key takeaways Lightwell is a huge effort to safeguard open-source software.
That is, businesses will feed the initiative information about the open-source software they run.

As Daniel Steinberg, founder and maintainer of the popular open-source data transfer program cURL , recently said, "The rate of incoming security reports is four to five times higher than it was in 2024 and double the.

Since Anthropic's Mythos Preview model has already identified nearly 3,900 serious security vulnerabilities in open-source software in just a few weeks, the urgent need for faster fixes is crystal clear.

This generation of Snapdragon chips is a significant step up from the previous in terms of power, but it retains the same 70Wh battery as the 2024 version, supporting my experience that with the additional performance.
One day in the office, I left the laptop on max brightness and went about my day: working in the browser, taking a video call or two, and multitasking, only to find it dropped to 20% by 1 p.m.

When I charged the laptop at 2%, it was at 45% in under 30 minutes.

Lenovo: I've tested dozens of laptops from both brands, and here's my pick The 2026 refresh is powered by a Snapdragon X2 Elite processor and Qualcomm's Adreno GPU, with different configurations scaling up to 32GB and.
As mentioned above, the Snapdragon X2 Elite paired with 32GB of RAM on this version is significantly more powerful than the 2024 version.
